---
title: "Air Analyzer"
page-layout: full
---

<style>
body {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 12% 12%, rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.38), transparent 32%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 18%, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.26), transparent 36%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 88%, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.18), transparent 38%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #3f4358 0%, #717a8f 45%, #075985 100%) !important;
  color: #f8fafc;
}

#quarto-content {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 12% 12%, rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.38), transparent 32%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 88% 18%, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.26), transparent 36%),
    radial-gradient(circle at 78% 88%, rgba(34, 211, 238, 0.18), transparent 38%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, #3f4358 0%, #717a8f 45%, #075985 100%) !important;
  min-height: 100vh;
}

.quarto-title-block {
  display: none;
}

.page-columns .content {
  max-width: 1200px;
}

.home-hero {
  min-height: 70vh;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1.2fr 0.8fr;
  gap: 3rem;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 4rem 1rem 2rem 1rem;
}

.home-title {
  font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 6rem);
  font-weight: 900;
  letter-spacing: -0.08em;
  line-height: 0.95;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  color: #f8fafc;
}

.home-subtitle {
  font-size: clamp(1.3rem, 2.5vw, 2rem);
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #bae6fd;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}

.home-description {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #cbd5e1;
  max-width: 650px;
}

.hero-image {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: center;
  align-items: center;
}

.hero-image img {
  width: min(100%, 430px);
  border-radius: 32px;
  box-shadow:
    0 30px 80px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45),
    0 0 80px rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.22);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
}

.section-title {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  color: #f8fafc;
}

.card-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1.2rem;
  margin-bottom: 4rem;
}

.home-card {
  min-height: 220px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  border-radius: 28px;
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.09);
  border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18);
  backdrop-filter: blur(18px);
  box-shadow: 0 20px 45px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25);
  transition: transform 0.25s ease, background 0.25s ease, box-shadow 0.25s ease;
}

.home-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-8px);
  background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.14);
  box-shadow: 0 28px 65px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35);
}

.home-card h3 {
  color: #f8fafc;
  font-size: 1.35rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}

.home-card p {
  color: #cbd5e1;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  line-height: 1.55;
}

.home-card a {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-top: 0.8rem;
  color: #7dd3fc;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-decoration: none;
}

.home-card a:hover {
  color: #bae6fd;
}

@media (max-width: 1000px) {
  .home-hero {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    text-align: center;
  }

  .home-description {
    margin: 0 auto;
  }

  .card-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}

@media (max-width: 650px) {
  .card-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .home-hero {
    padding-top: 2rem;
  }
}
</style>

::: {.home-hero}

::: {.hero-text}

<div class="home-title">Air Analyzer</div>

<div class="home-subtitle">Wearable Smart Mask for Breathing Activity Monitoring</div>

<div class="home-description">
Air Analyzer is an embedded system designed to monitor breathing-related activity using a microcontroller-based architecture.

The project focuses on sensor acquisition, firmware development, interrupt-based logic, and documentation of the embedded workflow.
</div>

:::

::: {.hero-image}

<img src="images/prova2.png" alt="Air Analyzer system overview">

:::

:::

<div class="section-title">Project Sections</div>

:::: {.card-grid}

::: {.home-card}

### Project Overview

General description of the Air Analyzer project, including motivation, objectives, and repository structure.

[Open →](overview.qmd)

:::

::: {.home-card}

### Hardware

Description of the hardware architecture, sensor connections, microcontroller board, and physical setup.

[Open →](hardware.qmd)

:::

::: {.home-card}

### Firmware

Explanation of the embedded firmware, main source files, interrupt-based approach, and communication logic.

[Open →](firmware.qmd)

:::

::: {.home-card}

### Usage

Instructions for cloning, building, flashing, and using the project.

[Open →](usage.qmd)

:::

::::
